title: Bulk add Automations to All Boards within a Workspace
excerpt: It’s tedious to need to add the same automation over and over again board by board within a workspace. It would be useful to have a bulk add feature to add an automation to all boards at the same time.

posts.author: ggarofalo11 (Gaby)
posts.cookedHtml: It’s tedious to need to add the same automation over and over again board by board within a workspace. It would be useful to have a bulk add feature to add an automation to all boards at the same time.
